creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to Daniel Engberg from comment #22)
I already did.
> From my side it's OK to remove the port. I guess we should test if
> all mentioned ports support decoding through ffmpeg and/or ask the
> maintainers if they object to the removal.
I agree with this
> and/or ask the maintainers if they object to the removal.
100%. But never received anything directly. I only noticed any of this
because I'm subscribed to the commit list.

So I'm not sure what your intended point was.

--Chris
